channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper arrested on domestic violence charges
item.description: Denver Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper has been arrested on domestic violence charges.

item.title: Israel-Hezbollah conflict raises doubts about potential US-Iran peace agreement
item.description: The likelihood of a US-Iran deal to end the Iran war remains uncertain as Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continue fighting.

item.title: Trump says he wants Pulte to begin reducing the intelligence office
item.description: President Trump told the Wall Street Journal he may even want to abolish the Office of the Director of National Intelligence.

item.title: DOJ argues Trump could 'bulldoze' Statue of Liberty in White House ballroom hearing
item.description: Three appellate judges heard arguments Friday on whether President Trump's White House ballroom construction can proceed.
